project.name: aresearch
project.description: A Next.js App Router application for ingesting Arena blocks and related OCR, transcripts, and external content into SQLite, embedding searchable text with OpenAI, and querying it through a React UI and API routes.

edges.description: README documents UI usage and search flow
package.json defines runtime scripts and dependencies for the app
tsconfig enables TypeScript strictness and path resolution
Next config applies to the App Router application
PostCSS config wires Tailwind processing for global CSS
Environment example declares OpenAI key expected by embedding code
CI runs the Node test suite
CI production build validates the Next.js app
Search eval fixture configures the eval runner
Next generated ambient types are included by tsconfig

layers.name: Frontend UI
layers.description: React App Router pages, layouts, and CSS that render the research/search interface.

layers.name: API Routes
layers.description: Next.js route handlers exposing Arena ingestion, enrichment jobs, search, channels, and recommendations.

layers.name: Domain Services
layers.description: Library modules that implement Arena client access, ingestion, enrichment, embeddings, search, OCR, transcripts, and content cleaning.

layers.name: Data and Storage
layers.description: SQLite schema, vector indexes, and data fixtures used by search evaluation and persistence checks.

layers.name: Tooling and CI
layers.description: Project scripts, package/tool configuration, and GitHub Actions workflow that verify and operate the codebase.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Human-facing project setup and usage documentation.

layers.name: Miscellaneous
layers.description: Remaining files that do not fit the primary architectural groupings.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the app purpose, setup flow, search API, and stack choices.

tour.title: Application Shell and UI
tour.description: Inspect the App Router layout and the main React page that drives channel browsing, enrichment actions, and search interactions.

tour.title: Persistent Data Model
tour.description: Review the canonical SQLite schema and database bootstrapper before following ingestion or search flows.

tour.title: Arena Ingestion Pipeline
tour.description: Follow how Arena users, channels, and blocks are fetched, normalized, stored, and exposed through API routes.

tour.title: Content Enrichment Jobs
tour.description: Understand OCR, external content fetching, transcript extraction, search text construction, and chunk creation before embedding.

tour.title: Embedding and Search
tour.description: Trace how pending blocks/chunks are embedded and how text/image search queries flow through sqlite-vec plus lexical reranking.

tour.title: Safety and Regression Checks
tour.description: Finish with CI, unit tests, semantic search evals, and stale-embedding detection scripts that protect the system from obvious drift.
